source: Perseus Mining Limited BMO Presentation, February 26, 2026 (https://perseusmining.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/BMO-Presentation-Feb-26.pdf)

assets.name: Yaouré Gold Mine
assets.notes: FY2026 guidance midpoint: 168,000-184,000 oz = 176,000 oz. AISC midpoint: $1,620-$1,790 = $1,705/oz. Years 2-5 are estimated with mild profile variation (not flat) to reflect normal mine sequencing around a steady-state base. Currency: USD. Company holds 90% of Yaoure; figures shown on 100% basis per reserve table. Mine life 16+ years from reserve statement.

assets.name: Edikan Gold Mine
assets.notes: FY2026 guidance midpoint: 154,000-169,000 oz = 161,500 oz. AISC midpoint: $1,470-$1,620 = $1,545/oz. Years 2-5 are estimated with slight variation and gentle decline toward late mine-life profile (not flat). Currency: USD. Company holds 90% of Edikan; figures shown on 100% basis per reserve table. Mine life ~5 years from reserve statement.

assets.name: Sissingué Gold Complex
assets.notes: FY2026 guidance midpoint: 78,000-87,000 oz = 82,500 oz. AISC midpoint: $1,810-$2,000 = $1,905/oz. Years 2-5 are estimated with non-flat profile to reflect normal grade/sequence variation across Sissingue-Bagoe feed. Currency: USD. Company holds 86% of Sissingue (90% of Bagoe component); figures shown on 100% basis per reserve table. Includes Fimbiasso and Bagoe projects. Mine life 12+ years from reserve statement.

assets.name: Nyanzaga Gold Project
assets.notes: Development project: first gold pour Q1 CY2027 (calendar year, approximately Q4 FY2027). Estimated production ramp to >200k oz/year FY28-FY41 per reserve statement (14 years @ >200k pa). Year1=FY2026 (pre-production), Year2=FY2027 (ramp-up, conservatively estimated at 0), Year3-5=FY2028-2030 (steady-state at 200k oz/year midpoint). AISC: $1,621/oz average based on US$3,000/oz gold price assumption per reserve statement. Capex Year1 (FY2026): US$121M incurred through Dec 2025 plus remaining development. Company holds 80% of Nyanzaga; figures shown on 100% basis. Ore Reserve 4.0 Moz, mine life 16 years from Feb 2026 announcement. Currency: USD.
